news.title: How a DeKalb armed robbery triggered a motel standoff
news.summary: A morning shooting during an armed robbery on Blazing Pine Path in DeKalb County triggered a major SWAT response at a nearby motel.

news.title: Henry County police search for man in $1,600 Kroger scam
news.summary: Henry County police are searching for a man who scammed a grocery store cashier out of $1,600.

news.title: Watch sale setup ends in gunpoint basketball court robbery
news.summary: Atlanta police seek three men who robbed a watch seller at gunpoint at an Atlanta Student Movement Blvd SW basketball court.

news.title: Police investigation closes Williams Street at 10th in midtown Atlanta
news.summary: A police investigation has closed part of midtown Atlanta as officers examine an incident on 10th Street,

news.title: DeKalb County deputy arrested, fired after investigation into misuse of license plate camera system
news.summary: "The misuse of law enforcement technology or confidential information for any unauthorized purpose is a serious breach of the public's trust," the sheriff said.
